title: acmella alba var. alba
intro: Acmella alba var. alba, also known as Toothache Plant or Buzzbutton, is a perennial plant species native to South America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to numb the mouth and reduce pain, making it a popular treatment for toothaches and other oral health issues. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, providing relief from pain and swelling. Acmella alba var. alba can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote oral health and alleviate discomfort.
